channel.title: Washington County Probate Court
channel.description: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. Domain is .com (not .gov/.org) — verified genuine. Sitewide WordPress /feed/ exists but is not probate-specific. Dedicated forms page with five categorized form groups. KNOWN ISSUE: washingtoncountymaine.com has been returning HTTP 403 to this bot's requests (likely WAF bot-blocking) since mid-2026; kept enabled so the status dashboard surfaces it and it recovers automatically if the block is lifted.
